title: Ion-Selective Nanosensor for Photoacoustic and Fluorescence Imaging of Potassium.
author: Lee CH Folz J Zhang W Jo J Tan JWY Wang X Kopelman R
content: S-EPMC5799881 PMC5799881 Ion-Selective Nanosensor for Photoacoustic and Fluorescence Imaging of Potassium. Ion-selective optodes (ISOs), the optical analog of ion-selective electrodes, have played an increasingly important role in chemical and biochemical analysis. Here we extend this technique
